title: Add webhook retry backoff
description: Retry failed webhook deliveries with exponential backoff to reduce thundering-herd load on downstream services.

plan.summary:
## Summary
Add exponential backoff with jitter to webhook retry scheduling using the existing RetryScheduler infrastructure.

## Documentation impact
Update docs/webhooks/retry-policy.md with new backoff parameters.

## UAT coverage
New scenarios needed — see Phase 6.

## PR
(not yet opened)
plan.dddAnalysis: Context: Webhooks (existing, supporting). Adding RetryPolicy VO to encapsulate backoff config. No new aggregates; RetryScheduler (service) extended.
plan.testStrategy: Unit tests for RetryPolicy VO invariants (max delay cap, jitter range). Integration test via WebhookDeliveryService.scheduleRetry().

steps.description: Add RetryPolicy value object in src/domain/webhooks/retry-policy.ts
Update RetryScheduler to accept a RetryPolicy and compute exponential backoff with jitter
steps.risks: Existing callers pass a flat delay — update them to pass a RetryPolicy instance

potentialChallenges: Clock drift between retry scheduler and event consumer
Max delay cap must be enforced as a VO invariant

triageDetail.reasoning: Clear feature request; existing RetryScheduler infrastructure makes this tractable.
